title: BRIGHTSIDE ANIMAL CENTER - 211info
text: BRIGHTSIDE ANIMAL CENTER BRIGHTSIDE ANIMAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter and adoption services for displaced animals, microchipping services, and a pet food bank that people can access every 3 months. Also sells Deschutes County dog licenses at cost. This is a no-kill shelter. All animals have been spayed and neutered. 1355 NE Hemlock Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday 11am-5:30pm, Thursday 11am-5pm Email (541) 923-0882 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 923-0882 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: Animal licenses are $20. Donations accepted. DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Highway 97 going north from Bend, exit on Hemlock Avenue on the right Services: Animal Adoption Animal Licenses Animal Shelters Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRIGHTSIDE ANIMAL CENTER
